title: Original wayfarer
description: Timeless and iconic, the Original Wayfarer sunglasses feature a classic design with durable acetate frames and dark lenses for stylish UV protection.

title: Aviator classic
description: The Aviator Classic combines sleek metal frames with teardrop lenses, offering a bold, retro look and exceptional sun protection.

title: Clubmaster classic
description: The Clubmaster Classic blends vintage charm with modern style, featuring a distinctive browline design and metal temples for a sophisticated look.

title: Erika classic
description: The Erika Classic sunglasses feature round lenses and a lightweight frame, with polarized lenses for enhanced clarity and UV protection.

title: Explorer V
description: Designed for adventurers, the Explorer V sunglasses feature a durable square frame and reinforced lenses, perfect for outdoor activities.

title: Hexagonal flat lenses
description: Bold and geometric, the Hexagonal Flat Lenses sunglasses feature a unique shape and flat lenses, offering a modern, edgy look.

title: Mega balorama
description: Make a statement with the Mega Balorama sunglasses, featuring oversized frames and wide lenses for maximum coverage and retro style.

title: Round metal
description: Sleek and minimalist, the Round Metal sunglasses offer a timeless circular design with a thin metal frame for a vintage-inspired look.

title: Clubmaster metal
description: The Clubmaster Metal combines a classic browline design with sleek metal frames, offering a sophisticated and modern twist on the vintage style.

title: Square 1971 classic
description: Inspired by '70s style, the Square 1971 Classic sunglasses feature a bold square frame and thick acetate, perfect for making a fashion statement.

title: Doreen
description: The Doreen sunglasses offer a chic cat-eye design with a vintage flair, providing timeless elegance and UV protection in a lightweight frame.

title: Round double bridge
description: With their round lenses and double bridge design, the Round Double Bridge sunglasses offer a bold, retro-inspired look with modern appeal.

title: Predator 2
description: Sporting an aggressive, angular design, the Predator 2 sunglasses feature dark reflective lenses and a wraparound frame for ultimate protection.

title: Elliot
description: Minimalistic and sleek, the Elliot sunglasses feature a rectangular frame and lightweight construction, providing everyday style and UV protection.

title: Round reverse
description: The Round Reverse sunglasses feature a unique reverse round lens design and a metal frame, offering a fashion-forward, edgy look with UV protection.

title: Holbrook
description: The Holbrook sunglasses combine a classic square frame with modern design. Made from durable acetate, they offer both style and comfort, perfect for everyday wear.

title: Enigma ink
description: The Enigma Ink sunglasses feature a bold, contemporary design with striking ink-colored frames. A stylish choice for those seeking a unique, standout look.

title: Flex scape
description: Built for flexibility and comfort, the Flex Scape sunglasses feature a lightweight frame with a flexible, sporty design, perfect for active lifestyles.

title: Frogskins
description: The Frogskins sunglasses offer a vibrant, retro-inspired design with a colorful frame and lightweight construction, making them perfect for casual, sunny days.

title: HTSN Metal
description: The HTSN Metal sunglasses combine sleek metal frames with a modern, minimalistic design, offering both durability and style in a lightweight package.

title: BiSphaera
description: The BiSphaera sunglasses feature an innovative design with a spherical frame, offering a futuristic, fashion-forward look that stands out from the crowd.

title: Flak 2.0 XL
description: The Flak 2.0 XL sunglasses offer enhanced coverage with a larger frame and high-performance lenses, ideal for sports and outdoor activities.

title: Thurso
description: The Thurso sunglasses feature a bold, wraparound design with a durable frame, providing excellent protection and a sporty, adventurous look.

title: Wind Jacket
description: Designed for outdoor enthusiasts, the Wind Jacket sunglasses offer a snug fit, wraparound frame, and enhanced protection against wind and debris during high-speed activities.

title: Sutro Tl Sweep
description: The Sutro Tl Sweep sunglasses feature a large, wide lens design for maximum coverage, perfect for athletes and adventurers seeking bold style and functionality.

title: Leffingwell
description: The Leffingwell sunglasses offer a sleek, stylish frame with sharp detailing, combining modern elegance with durable construction for everyday wear.

title: VE4361 Biggie
description: The VE4361 Biggie sunglasses from Versace feature oversized frames with bold, luxury styling. Embellished with the iconic Medusa logo, they offer a statement look with premium quality and UV protection.

title: VE2245
description: The VE2245 sunglasses from Versace offer a glamorous, fashionable design with a bold rectangular frame. Featuring luxurious detailing and high-quality lenses, they make a statement wherever you go.

description: Bold, oversized frames featuring the iconic Medusa logo for a statement-making, fashion-forward look.
